Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings not reported.

R. Lewis Van Blois, Esq., appearing for Petitioner: Muthana Shaibi, uncle and guardian ad litem for Minor: Farhin Shaibi present in court. Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $200,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $49,200 payable to Law Firm of R. Lewis Van Blois, Inc.
Costs: $11,341.58
A net balance of $139,458.42 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Bank of America, Mission 23rd Branch, 2701 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 8/16/2018 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
